# harvester_kubeovn_ovn_dnat_rule (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "harvester_kubeovn_ovn_dnat_rule" "example" {
  name          = "example-ovn-dnat"
  ovn_eip       = "example-ovn-eip"
  internal_port = "8080"
  external_port = "80"
  protocol      = "tcp"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) A unique name
- `ovn_eip` (String)

### Optional

- `description` (String) Any text you want that better describes this resource
- `external_port` (String)
- `internal_port` (String)
- `ip_name` (String)
- `ip_type` (String)
- `labels` (Map of String)
- `protocol` (String)
- `tags` (Map of String)
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))
- `v4_ip` (String)
- `v6_ip` (String)
- `vpc` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `message` (String)
- `state` (String)
- `status_ip_name` (String)
- `status_ready` (Boolean)
- `status_v4_eip` (String)
- `status_v6_eip` (String)
- `status_vpc` (String)
